metadata.description: Personal fork of Fluent (FSRS-6 scheduler) — single-plugin marketplace hosting the fluent plugin. Original by Mohammad Kermani (github.com/m98).

plugins.name: fluent
plugins.description: Fluent — AI Language Learning Kit. Personal AI tutor for any target language (Dutch, Spanish, French, German, Japanese, Korean, Arabic, and more). Uses spaced repetition (FSRS-6), active recall, adaptive difficulty, and progress tracking across 6 databases. Run /fluent-setup to onboard, then /fluent-learn, /fluent-vocab, /fluent-writing, /fluent-speaking, /fluent-reading, /fluent-review daily.
